title: How much do you trust LLMs with your health questions?
abstract: As software engineers, we've definitely seen the best use case for LLMs so far. Coding agents have shown us what these models can do in an area we can actually verify. But lately I've found
abstract_zh: team, 🚀 如果你最近在想“我的健康问题能放心问大模型吗？”那可得试试 **Ask HN: How much do you trust LLMs with your health questions?**。这货简直是个效率小天才，在写周报时帮你查漏补缺，调Bug时给你靠谱建议！虽然它不能代替医生，但至少可以先筛一遍那些不那么专业的答案，让你省心不少！来试试吧，信任就从一点点开始～
